news.t: Derivative-Based Strategies Take Center Stage at Asset Allocation Summit
J.P. Morgan Debuts Equity Premium Yield ETFs ROCY and ROCQ on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: ROCQ is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.62%, Apple at 7.44%, Alphabet at 6.51%, Micron Technology at 6.17%, and Microsoft at 5.22%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Yield ETF (ROCQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in Nasdaq-listed equities while using equity-linked notes to generate income. The strategy combines growth exposure with a covered call approach to support yield and reduce volatility. ROCQ was launched on Mar 18, 2026 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: Derivative-Based Strategies Take Center Stage at Asset Allocation Summit
data.text: The sheer complexity of exchange-traded funds (ETFs) using derivative-based strategies could have investors turning the other away. Instead, investors have been running towards them.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Debuts Equity Premium Yield ETFs ROCY and ROCQ on Nasdaq
data.text: New Active ETFs Expand Innovative Derivative Income Suite NEW YORK, March 19, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the launch of two new active ETFs on the Nasdaq Exchange...
